CustomField.description: Lookup to RegulatoryAuthorizationType — the PSS type catalog record that defines the permit kind, issuing authority, and default parameters. Populated by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator from NEPA_Permit_Matrix__mdt and NEPA_Permit_Type_Catalog__mdt seed data.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The type of federal permit or authorization required (e.g., CWA Section 404, ESA Section 7, NHPA Section 106).
CustomField.label: Permit Type
